messages.text: edge of my seat I tell ya

messages.text: how does that come dine with me clip go? enjoy the money rabbit, i hope it makes you very happy LOL

messages.text: Rabbit's about to have a steak dinner on us lol

messages.text: absolutely mugged off but sticking to my morals haha

messages.speaker: RABBIT
messages.text: I've put the 20 in for the majority of rounds

messages.speaker: CHICKEN
messages.text: And extra payout for us too, 5 more rounds!

messages.text: i dont know whether duck is telling the truth or gaslighting me lol

messages.text: Duck has donated 20 most of the time

messages.text: for me the duck has been at 0 every round

messages.text: i think researchers are trolling us 99%

messages.text: Should I go for 0 this round or hold strong?

messages.text: its pennies at this stage anyway tbh

messages.text: if I am never a +20 on your screen know the researchers are playing games with us

messages.text: For me the moose, rabbit and green bird have been 0 the entire time

messages.text: thx gorilla...really??? enjoy your two cents LOL

messages.speaker: CHICKEN
messages.text: Now that we've caught you, start contributing lol

messages.text: I think they are too stupid to realize we all get more if they contribute..including them lol

messages.text: green duck is gaslighting or researchers are trolling

messages.text: but I'll take my dollar and say thank you

messages.text: I am not gaslighting. I am contributing every single round

messages.speaker: CHICKEN
messages.text: Last round, it was nice playing with you folks :)

messages.text: I'm okay, just doing some studies

messages.text: i think it was a joke

messages.text: will put 0 now to provide more interesting data

messages.text: plus we get the most this way i dont understand

messages.speaker: CHICKEN
